👋 Hi there! Welcome to my portfolio.

I’m Faizan Ali — a full‑stack web developer and Software Engineering student at MUST (2023‑2027).

I build modern, secure, and AI‑ready web solutions for businesses and startups.
How can I assist you today? You can ask me about:
• My services & technologies
• Hiring me on Fiverr / Upwork

🚀 I provide end‑to‑end web development and AI integration services.

My core services include:
  • PHP / Laravel Development – Custom apps, SaaS, dashboards, secure authentication
  • MERN Stack Development – MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js full‑stack apps
  • Node.js Backend APIs – Scalable REST APIs, microservices, admin panels
  • AI Agent Integration – Chatbots, OpenAI/Gemini integration, workflow automation
  • SEO Optimization – Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, on‑page & off‑page
  • UI/UX Design – Responsive, modern interfaces using Antigravity & custom CSS
  • Website Security – OWASP‑based hardening, SSL, vulnerability patching
  • WordPress Solutions – Custom themes, SEO plugins, performance tuning
👉 View full services & details

💻 My technology stack is modern and battle‑tested:

Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Antigravity UI
Backend: PHP (OOP, MVC), Laravel, Node.js, Express.js
Databases: MySQL / MariaDB, MongoDB
CMS: WordPress (theme customization, SEO plugins)
Tools: Git, GitHub, cPanel, VPS, Docker (basics)
AI/ML: OpenAI API, Dialogflow, custom chatbot integration
SEO/Security: Core Web Vitals, Yoast/RankMath, OWASP Top‑10 mitigation

I also use the Antigravity framework for ultra‑fast, responsive UI design.👉 See my complete skills & tools

I always focus on clean code, SEO, security, and client satisfaction.👉 Let’s discuss your project

🏆 What sets me apart?

✅ Full‑stack expertise – I handle both frontend & backend, no need for multiple hires.
✅ SEO & security built‑in – Every project is optimized and hardened from day one.
✅ AI‑ready solutions – I can integrate modern AI agents to automate your workflows.

My goal is to make your business grow with technology, not just build another website.

🤖 I specialize in AI agent integration for web applications.

Services include:
  • Custom chatbots (like this one!) for websites
  • OpenAI API integration (GPT‑3.5/4) for content generation, analysis

I can make your business smarter, more efficient, and available 24/7.
👉 Explore AI services

📈 SEO is not an afterthought — it’s part of my development process.

I implement:
  • Technical SEO (structured data, sitemaps, robots.txt)
  • On‑page optimization (meta tags, headings, keywords)
  • Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS) improvements
  • Image optimization & lazy loading
  • Mobile‑first responsive design
This means your site loads fast, ranks higher, and attracts more visitors.
👉 Learn about my SEO approach

🔒 I build websites with security as a top priority.

My security checklist includes:
  • Input sanitization & validation (XSS, SQLi prevention)
  • Secure authentication (password hashing, JWT, OAuth)
  • HTTPS enforcement & HSTS headers
  • CSRF protection & secure session management
  • Regular dependency updates & vulnerability scanning
  • File upload restrictions & secure file permissions
Your business data and your users’ privacy are safe with me.
👉 Read about my security services

Whether you need a simple blog or a complex business site, I can make WordPress fast, secure, and tailored to your brand.
